name: Toriwasa (Chicken & Parsely with Horesradish Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone chicken breasts.
2. Cut the chicken breasts horizontally into paper thin slices, then into shreds 1/4 inch wide.
3. In a small saucepan, combine chicken, sake, 1/8 teaspoon salt, and MSG. Bring to a boil.
4. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
5. In another small pan, bring together 5/8 cup water, 1/2 teaspoon salt. Cook parsley for 1 minute. Drain and rinse under cold water.
6. To assemble: Mix wasabi paste with 2 tablespoons soy sauce and MSG in a bowl. Stir in chicken, liquid, and parsley; mix thoroughly. Divide into 6 small bowls and cover with shredded nori.
